scripts.predev: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); try { const rootEnv = fs.readFileSync('../../.env', 'utf8'); const studioEnv = rootEnv.split('\n').filter(line => line.startsWith('SANITY_STUDIO_')).join('\n'); fs.writeFileSync('.env', studioEnv); } catch (e) { console.error('Root .env not found'); }"
